title: Copilot Readiness Assessment and Data Hygiene

notes: Readiness scanning validates SharePoint Advanced Management posture, while enablement remains guided.

title: Information Architecture Review

notes: License planning data is reused across readiness, rollout, and ROI tracking.

notes: No dedicated solution is scaffolded yet; implementation guidance remains in the framework playbooks and dashboard evidence can track readiness later.

title: Training and Awareness Program
notes: Training completion signals can be tracked, but learning content remains owned by the customer.

title: Data Minimization and Grounding Scope

notes: Feature management and access policies can govern web grounding, while business policy still drives enablement decisions.

title: Data Residency and Cross-Border Data Flow Governance
notes: Residency evidence is aggregated through monitoring and control attestations rather than direct automation.

notes: No dedicated solution is scaffolded yet; implementation guidance remains in the framework playbooks and dashboard evidence can track readiness later.
